title: swida alba
intro: Swida alba, also known as White Guelder Rose or Viburnum opulus, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which help to reduce swelling, prevent infections, and promote urine production. The health benefits of Swida alba include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, treat fever and headaches, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health concerns. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in herbal medicine to make tinctures and ointments, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
